{{CargoRelic
|name=Werewolf Amulet
|class_id=20729
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=An amulet made from the fangs, mane, and silver bullets of a werewolf, blessed with holy water, possesses certain exorcism powers, protecting the bearer from werewolf attacks!
|fame=18
|art=12
|fth=31
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 5 Avatars activated, Snail HP +30<br>Avatars Activated: 100/100
|ss2=Per 5 Avatars activated, Snail HP +40<br>Avatars Activated: 100/100
|ss3=Per 5 Avatars activated, Snail HP +50<br>Avatars Activated: 100/100
|ss4=Per 5 Avatars activated, Snail HP +50<br>Avatars Activated: 100/100
|ss7=Per 5 Avatars activated, Snail HP +50<br>Avatars Activated: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
